title: geum × hirtigenum
intro: Geum × hirtigenum, a hybrid of the geum genus, is a type of flowering plant known for its vibrant pink to reddish-purple blooms and its ability to thrive in moist environments. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Geum × hirtigenum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and promote digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Geum × hirtigenum is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties in a variety of ways.
